name: agent-skill-creator
description: This enhanced skill should be used when the user asks to create an agent, automate a repetitive workflow, create a custom skill, or needs advanced agent creation capabilities. Activates with phrases like every day, daily I have to, I need to repeat, create agent for, automate workflow, create skill for, need to automate, turn process into agent.
